items.title: South Korea’s LetinAR is building optics behind AI glasses
items.summary: A lens the size of a thumbnail — and the South Korean startup that makes it — could become the optical backbone of the AI glasses era.

items.title: I’m a Normie. Can Normies Really Vibe Code?

items.title: Microsoft is retiring Teams’ Together Mode
items.summary: Microsoft launched Teams' Together Mode during the pandemic to give the illusion of a bunch of people sitting in a conference room together, even if they were really sitting at home without pants on. But times have changed, and it's now being retired in favor of a more simplified Teams experience. The feature used AI […]

items.title: Introducing Google Antigravity 2.0
Revamped Siri will reportedly offer autodeleting chats
items.summary: Apple is hoping that its record on privacy can be the differentiator on the AI front and maybe even buy it a little slack as it continues to lag behind the competition. According to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman, the more chatbot-like Siri set to debut in iOS 27 will include the option to autodelete chat histories. […]
